AMD Developer Hackathon: ACT II  ·  Unicorn Track

Where does your
test data come from?

SafeSeedOps Lite generates privacy-safe, referentially-consistent synthetic databases using multi-agent AI on AMD ROCm — in seconds, not weeks.

Launch Dashboard → See how it works
$2B+
Synthetic data market (Gartner)
100%
FK integrity — every generation
<1s
Schema validation, any DDL
0
PII in generated data — ever
The problem

Every team hits the same wall.

Realistic relational data is the hardest dependency in software development — yet almost nobody solves it properly.

2–4 wks
Typical time to handcraft test data for a multi-table schema
30–40%
Of project time engineers spend on data plumbing, not features
$4.45M
Average cost of a data breach from copying prod data into dev (IBM, 2023)
⏳

Weeks lost on every project

Handcrafting test data for complex relational schemas takes 2–4 weeks per project — and repeats every sprint, for every environment.

💥

FK violations break everything

Null columns and broken foreign keys silently corrupt test suites — traced back to data, not code, after hours of debugging.

🔒

Prod data in dev is a GDPR violation

Copying production databases to local environments exposes PII, violates GDPR, SOC2, and HIPAA. One incident, one audit, one legal bill.

How it works

Five steps. One command.

SafeSeedOps runs your schema through a multi-agent pipeline — validation, planning, generation, and export — without you touching a single row.

📐
Design schema
Visual designer or paste PostgreSQL DDL directly
Visual · DDL import
🛡️
Airlock validates
14 rules across lexical, security, and semantic checks
Blocks before generation
🗺️
DAG planning
Topological sort: parents always seeded before children
FK integrity guaranteed
🤖
LLM generates
Gemma on AMD ROCm streams realistic, domain-correct rows
ROCm · Fireworks · Fallback
📦
Parquet export
Clean files with manifest.json and SHA-256 checksums
CSV · JSON · Parquet
$ uv run seed dev
✓ Backend started — FastAPI on :8000
✓ Frontend started — React on :3000
✓ AMD ROCm detected — MI250 · local Gemma inference enabled
✓ Airlock engine ready — 14 rules loaded (v2.4.0)
→ Open http://localhost:3000 to start generating
Architecture

Five decoupled layers. Hover to explore.

Every component is independently testable and swappable. Moving from SQLite to PostgreSQL, or from local ROCm to cloud, requires only a config change — no code rewrites.

React SPA — Frontend
Interactive schema designer · ER diagram · Cytoscape.js
▼
FastAPI Backend
REST routing · Pydantic validation · OpenAPI auto-docs · Python 3.11
▼
Multi-Agent AI Platform
Workflow Engine → Agent Manager → Tool Manager → 12 built-in tools · HITL verification
Airlock Validation Engine
Lexical → Security → Semantic · 14 typed rules · SHA-256 fingerprinting
▼
Runtime Platform
Redis cache · circuit breaker · LRU eviction · in-memory fallback
LLM Gateway
AMD ROCm → Fireworks AI → Any LLM · Gemma 2/3 · Llama 3.2
▼
SQLite (source of truth)
Projects · schemas · jobs · history · config · Unit-of-Work transactions
Artifact Storage
Parquet files · manifest.json · SHA-256 checksums · streaming downloads
👆 Click any layer to learn more Each component is independently testable, swappable, and documented. The entire stack starts with uv run seed dev.
Vs. the alternatives

The only tool that does all three.

Faker has no concept of relationships. SDV lacks real-time streaming and AMD support. SafeSeedOps combines LLM generation, referential integrity, and ROCm acceleration in one package.

Feature Faker SDV SafeSeedOps Lite ✦
Referential integrity (FK/PK) ✕ No FK awareness ⚠ Partial, post-hoc fix ✓ PK-first DAG planner
LLM-powered generation ✕ No ✓ Yes ✓ Multi-provider (ROCm, Fireworks)
AMD ROCm support ✕ No ✕ No ✓ Native Gemma on ROCm
Real-time row streaming ⚠ Single values only ✕ Batch only ✓ Row-by-row streaming
PostgreSQL DDL import ✕ No ✕ No ✓ Full DDL parser
Parquet + manifest export ✕ CSV only ⚠ CSV/JSON ✓ JSON / CSV / Parquet + SHA-256
Multi-table FK graph support ✕ No ⚠ Limited ✓ Complex FK graphs, any depth
Enterprise validation pipeline ✕ No ✕ No ✓ 14-rule Airlock engine
Business outcomes

The ROI is measurable from day one.

SafeSeedOps replaces a manual, error-prone, legally risky process with an automated, compliant, audit-ready pipeline — for teams of any size.

⚡

Engineering velocity

Eliminate 2–4 weeks of data plumbing per project. Engineers ship features, not test fixtures. Every new environment gets populated in seconds.

~80% Reduction in time-to-test-data
🔐

Compliance by design

Zero PII ever leaves production. SafeSeedOps generates synthetic data from schemas, not records. GDPR, SOC2, and HIPAA compliance is structural, not procedural.

$0 PII exposure risk in dev environments
📊

Data quality guarantee

Every generated dataset passes 14 validation rules before a single row is created. FK integrity, PK uniqueness, enum constraints — all verified and logged.

100% Referential integrity across all tables
Why consider this

Built for the way modern teams actually work.

Not a script. Not a toy. A production-hardened AI platform with a clean migration path from prototype to enterprise.

01

Production-grade from the start

Multi-agent workflow engine, HITL verification, circuit breakers, Unit-of-Work transactions, SHA-256 artifact integrity, LRU eviction. This is running, shipped software — not a hackathon skeleton. Every engineering decision is documented and justified.

02

AMD-native — not a wrapper

Gemma inference runs locally on AMD ROCm with zero API cost and zero network latency. The LLM Gateway auto-detects AMD GPUs at startup via rocm-smi — no configuration required. Falls back to Fireworks AI on AMD-backed cloud infrastructure, then any major LLM.

03

Freemium path to enterprise SaaS

SafeSeedOps Lite is Apache 2.0 open-source. SafeSeedOps Pro adds multi-tenant RBAC, OAuth2, live database connectivity (PostgreSQL, MySQL, Oracle), distributed AMD Cloud workers, SOC2/GDPR/HIPAA compliance tooling, and OpenTelemetry dashboards. The Lite architecture is Pro-compatible — no rewrite needed.

04

One command to start, zero dependencies

The entire stack — backend, frontend, agents, validation, storage — starts with uv run seed dev. No Docker required for local development. No cloud accounts needed. A new engineer can be generating synthetic data in under 3 minutes from a fresh clone.

Tech stack

Every choice has a reason.

Frontend
React 18 + TypeScriptStrict typing, component-based
Cytoscape.jsInteractive ER diagram
Vite + Tailwind CSSOne-command startup, zero runtime CSS
Backend
FastAPI + Python 3.11Async, Pydantic-validated
SQLAlchemy ORMUnit-of-Work, per-entity repos
PyArrow / ParquetColumnar, snappy compression
AI Platform
Multi-agent workflow engineWorkflow → Agent → Tool
Gemma via AMD ROCmLocal, zero cost, zero latency
Fireworks AI fallbackAMD-backed cloud inference
Infrastructure
SQLite → PostgreSQL pathSingle-file Lite; scalable Pro
Redis + memory fallbackCircuit breaker, LRU eviction
uv package manager10× faster than pip

Ready to stop writing test data
and start building?

Launch the SafeSeedOps dashboard and generate your first synthetic database in under 3 minutes.
